## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX Labs and Diligent for organic search growth and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent (governance-focused SaaS, \~$7B valuation) seeks to modernize GTM approach and improve organic search performance](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers editorial team as a service, specializing in high-quality content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Diligent currently ranks for 11k keywords (avg. position 28) with 15x growth potential in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to provide proposal, focusing on aggressive content refresh strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### Diligent Company Context

  - [\~2,500 employees, mid-market to enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Leader in GRC (Governance, Risk, Compliance) space](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Owned by Insight Partners (PE fund), considering exit options (sale/IPO)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Revenue growth from \~$700M to current (undisclosed)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Strong brand recognition, particularly among S\&P 500 boards](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Current Marketing Challenges

  - [Outdated go-to-market approach](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Website content overload (2-3k pages) with poor user experience](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Organic search underperformance (avg. position 28, capturing \~40k/600k potential clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Internal resistance to change, particularly in sales team](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Need for modernized talent and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### GrowthX Labs Offering

  - [Editorial team as a service (content strategy, creation, optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Streamlined content production workflows with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [12-week ramp-up process, publishing by week 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Experience with technical and financial brands (e.g., Ramp, Normal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Capacity: 20M words/month, 60 employees (6 managing directors, 30 editors)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### Proposed Collaboration

  - [Focus on organic search growth](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Aggressive content refresh strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Potential for email marketing optimization (secondary focus)](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Collaborative approach with existing Diligent content team](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Aim to demonstrate quick results within 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX booked through mid-May, announcing Series A](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Diligent to provide procurement contact](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [GrowthX to send proposal and pricing details](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Diligent to send procurement team contact info to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up email with call recording](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide detailed proposal and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting for next week to maintain momentum](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Diligent to begin internal processes for potential vendor onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/ec1xuxdun_x7UaMg1Bx5nxs7w-1cyRh5?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
